name: hkx-python-build-fix
description: Python install/type/test failure recovery: minimal fix via tdd-guide (no dedicated python-build-resolver), then Python + general residual-risk review.

chain.label: Unblock Python checks
chain.task:
Fix Python build/install/type/test failures for:

{task}

Note: there is no dedicated hkx.python-build-resolver. Act as a minimal Python build fixer.

Rules:
- Sole writer for the active worktree.
- Minimal diffs only; no architecture or feature changes.
- Prefer local evidence (pyproject/setup, failing pytest/mypy/ruff/import errors) over broad rewrites.
- Re-run the failing Python commands and report remaining failures.
- Prefer red-green only when a regression test is needed to lock the failure; otherwise keep the fix surgical.
- Do not silence failures with bare except/pass.

Return root causes, changed files, commands run, and remaining failures.

parallel.label: Python safety
Minimal-fix review
Silent failures
